def: s.m. Entering (into); entrance (to a house, &c.), principal door or gate.
adj. = pra-veśak, q.v.
s.m. Barley.
s.m. Division, separation, part, portion, share.
part. Sundered, separated; divided, distributed, partitioned, apportioned, shared.
s.f. Fame, renown, reputation, celebrity.
adj. & s.m. Intelligent, skilful, knowing, clever, proticient, excellent, accomplished, conversant (with); — an able person, an adept, &c.
s.f. = S پروينتو प्रवीणत्व pra-vīṇatva, s.m. Skill, cleverness, proficiency, sagaciousness, acuteness, shrewdness, ability.
s.m. = S پروينتا प्रवीणता pra-vīṇatā, s.f. Skill, cleverness, proficiency, sagaciousness, acuteness, shrewdness, ability.
s.m. Skilfulness, cleverness; accurate knowledge.
s.m. A species of fragrant wood, yellow sandal.
adj. & s.m. Heroic, brave, strong, powerful; best, most excellent; — a hero, warrior, chief, prince, a person of rank or distinction.
part. Entered (into), gone (into), come (into); entered (upon), begun, commenced, engaged (in), occupied (with).
s.m. = prāvr̤iṭ; prāvr̤ish, q.v.
s.m. The rainy season, the rains, the two months Sāwan and Bhādoṅ (July and Aug.)
subs: s.f. A kind of weed which grows most luxuriantly during the rains, Boerhavia procumbens; cowach, Carpopogon pruriens
s.m. The Kadamb tree, Nauclea cadamba.

def: s.m. The rainy season, the rains, the two months Sāwan and Bhādoṅ (July and Aug.)
subs: s.f. A kind of weed which grows most luxuriantly during the rains, Boerhavia procumbens; cowach, Carpopogon pruriens
s.m. The Kadamb tree, Nauclea cadamba.

def: s.m. = S پراورتا प्रावृता prāvr̤itā, s.f. Veil, mantle, cloak, wrapper.
s.f. = S پراورت प्रावृत prāvr̤it, s.m. Veil, mantle, cloak, wrapper.
part. Settled, fixed, determined; done; begun, commenced; engaged (in, -meṅ), occupied (with); beginning, undertaking, doing, acting.
s.f. Enclosure, fence, hedge.

s.f. Continuous flow onwards, progress, advance; stream, current; rise, source, origin, beginning; activity, effort, employment, occupation; active life (as opp. to a life of contemplation); giving or applying oneself (to, -meṅ), engaging (in), undertaking; tendency (to), addiction (to), inclination, predilection (for); application, use, employment; continued application, perseverance; practice, conduct, behaviour; currency, continuance, continuity; the applicableness or validity of a rule; news, tidings, intelligence; the juice that exudes from the temples of an elephant in rut; name of any holy place; (in Gram.) the crude form (of a word); (in Arith.) the multiplier

s.m. Going away, departure; departure from life; seeking death by fasting, sitting down and fasting to death (as a religious or penitentiary act, or, like the practice of sitting in dharnā, to enforce compliance with a demand); principal part, largest portion; plurality, majority, majority of cases, general rule; quantity, abundance, plenty, excess; banquet, feast; — a stage or condition of life, age; (as a suffix, or a prefix), almost, like, resembling (e.g. amr̤it-prāya, 'like nectar')
subs: prāya-dīp, s.m. 'Almost an island,' a peninsula ( = upa-dvīp)
(for prāya-ćitta, the ś being euphonic), s.m. Expiation, expiatory act, atonement, penance, satisfaction, compensation, indemnification, amends ( = vulg. parāćit; parāśćit)
s.m. One who effects expiation, or makes atonement
s.f. Any work prescribing the rules of expiation
s.m. = prāyaśćitt-kartā, q.v.: prāyaśćitt-vidhi, s.f. A prescribed rule of penance or expiation.

def: adv. For the most part, mostly, chiefly; generally, commonly, usually; about, nearly, nearly all; in all probability, most likely; abundantly, largely.

s.m. 'Sacrifice, oblation'; 'the place of sacrifice'; name of a celebrated place of pilgrimage (commonly called Allahabad) at the confluence of the Ganges and Jamna with the supposed subterranean Sarasvatī (whence the other name tri-veṇī, 'the three streams.' Prayāg, in composition, is applied to other sacred places situated at the confluence of two rivers, e.g. deva-prayāg, rudra-prayāg, karṇa-prayāg, nanda-prayāg, in the Himalaya mountains)
subs: s.m. A Hindoo priest of Prayāg.

def: s.m. Departure from life, death, voluntary death ( = prāya).
s.m. Setting out, departing, departure, starting (on a journey); going forth, going to a distance, journey, march; invasion, attack; death
subs: s.m. Time of departure; time of death; death.

def: adv. See پرايه prāya.
s.m. Effort, exertion, labour, pains, endeavour; desire (for); pursuit (of).
s.m. = prā-yaśćit, q.v.s.v. prāya.
s.m. = prāyaśćit, q.v.s.v. prāyas.
s.m. See s.v. prāya.

ety: the preceding+S. aff. इन्, nom. ई
def: adj. Energetic, laborious, diligent, industrious, persevering.
s.m. Persevering effort, continued exertion or endeavour; activity, action, attempt, active effort
subs: v.n. To make an effort, to attempt, to endeavour
adj. & s.m. Assiduous, persevering, enterprising, active, energetic, zealous; — one who endeavours or makes effort, one who directs his whole attention and care (to).

def: s.m. Application, employment (of); use, usage, practice; procedure; act, action, effort, exertion, direction; occasion, cause, motive, object; consequence, result; contrivance, device, plan; an example, comparison; exhibition, performance, representation (of a play); a formula (to be recited), sacred text, authority; capital bearing interest, principal, loan.
adj. & s.m. Having some object in view, striving for an object; calculated for a particular purpose; using, applying; causing, stimulating; — one who strives for any object, &c.
adj. = pra-yojya, q.v.

adj. & s.m. Occasioning, effecting, conducing (to), causing or inducing (any act), leading (to); instigating, prompting, arousing, stimulating, exciting; deputing, appointing; — an original instigator, author (of any act); founder or institutor (of any ceremony); a law-giver, legislator; author, composer; a money-lender, creditor.
s.m. Employment, use (of); need (of), necessity (for), exigence, demand; cause, occasion, motive, origin; inducement; purpose, object, aim, intention, design; profit, interest, advantage
subs: adj. Having a particular use, aim, or purpose; done with a particular aim or design, designing, purposing; selfish; serviceable.

def: adj. = prayojanik, q.v.
adj. Necessary, requisite.
part. adj. Proper to be used or employed; to be practised; to be occasioned or produced; to be put forth or represented; fit, suitable, proper, necessary
subs: s.m. A servant, slave; capital, principal, 'that which is put out to interest.'

def: part. adj. Proper to be used or employed; to be practised; to be occasioned or produced; to be put forth or represented; fit, suitable, proper, necessary
subs: s.m. A servant, slave; capital, principal, 'that which is put out to interest.'

def: part. Joined (to), harnessed, yoked; used, employed; applied; associated or connected (with); endowed (with), possessing (as an attribute); compact, closely united, dense; produced (by), arising (from), occasioned (by), in consequence (of), owing (to).
s.m. A million.

s.f. Looking at, beholding, observing, seeing, regarding; sight, view, look, aspect; any public show or spectacle, a sight; a play, dancing; conception, understanding, intellect; circumspection, consideration.
s.m. Looking at, viewing, seeing, beholding; the eye; a public show or spectacle, a sight.
part. Looked at, viewed, beheld, seen.
part. adj. To be looked at, to be regarded, to be seen; worthy of being seen.
s.m. Love, affection, kindness, tender regard, kindliness, friendship
subs: adj. Devoted to the exercise of love
adj. & s.m. Intent on love, filled with affection, affectionate, loving, constant; — one who is constant in love, &c.
s.m. The quality or the essence of love
(-ke sāth), To be in love (with); to be fast friends (with)
adj. 'Coloured with the dye of love,' strongly attached (to), in love (with), enamoured (of)
s.m. 'Ocean of love'; the name of the tenth section of the Bhāgavat purāṇ, in which the love-sports of Kr̤ishṇa are related; an epithet of the Deity
adj. Connected with love, having relation to love
(-par), To show affection (for); to be enamoured (of)
s.f. A creeper; a parasitic plant
prem-vat, adj. Full of love, affectionate; — prem-vatī, s.f. Mistress, spouse
adj. Under the influence of love, over head and ears in love, deeply enamoured (of).

def: adj. & s.m. Loving, affectionate, friendly; — an affectionate person; a lover.
s.m. Swinging; a swing.
adj. & s.m. Urging, impelling, inciting; directing, ordering; sending, despatching; — one who incites, &c.; inciter; sender.
adj. Having the sense of inciting, or of the causal verb; — preraṇārthak kriyā, s.f. the causal verb.
adj. Having the sense of inciting, or of the causal verb; — preraṇārthak kriyā, s.f. the causal verb.
s.m. One who urges; instigator; sender; director, commander.
part. adj. & s.m. Urged, incited, impelled; sent, directed, despatched; — envoy, messenger; apostle, missionary.
s.m. A printing-press; printing office.
part. Sent away; sent, despatched (on an errand); ordered, directed ( = prerit).
s.f. Mistress, sweetheart, wife.
adj. Dearest, very dear, most beloved; most agreeable, most desired.
part. adj. & s.m. To be sent or despatched, proper to be sent; — a messenger, servant.

s.m. 'Half month of the departed, i.e. of the manes'; the dark half of the month (properly of the Gauṇa Aśvin, so called as peculiarly appointed for the celebration of obsequial rites to the pitr̤is or manes)
subs: vulg. paret-śarādh, s.m. Obsequial ceremonies offered to a departed relative during the year of his demise; — obsequial ceremonies in honour of the dead or of deceased ancestors
s.m., pret-kārya, s.m., pret-kriyā (vulg. paret-kiryā), s.f. = pret-śraddh, q.v.
s.m. 'House of the dead,' burying-ground, cemetery
s.m. The world of the dead, the region of disembodied spirits (in which they remain for one year, or until the obsequial rites are completed)
s.f. The river of the dead, the river of hell

def: s.f. A female ghost, demon or evil spirit.
s.f. Asking, questioning; question, inquiry.
adj. & s.m. Inquiring; one who asks or inquires after; inquirer, querist, investigator; inquisitive person.
s.m. Asking, inquiring, questioning, investigating.
s.f. A species of leguminous plant, Trigonella corniculata.
s.f. Contact, touch, contiguity.
part. Asked, inquired, questioned, interrogated, demanded.
s.m. The back; the hinder part of anything, the rear; the upper side, uppermost part, surface (see pīṭh)
adj. Variegated, party-coloured, dappled, piebald, speckled, spotted; manifold, diverse, various
subs: s.f. 'Having variegated leaves,' the plant Hemionitis cordifolia.

def: s.f. The aquatic plant Pistia stratiotes ( = praśnī).
s.f. A female friend, &c. (see prīt).
part. Pleased, delighted, gladdened, satistied; joyful, happy; beloved, loved, dear; gracious, kind, affectionate.

ety: the final k changing for euphony to g in comp. before certain letters
def: conj. Separate, single, several; separately, singly, severally, distinctly; apart from, besides, with exception of, except, without
subs: s.m. Individualized spirit, the spirit of an individual as detached from universal spirit or the soul of the universe
adv. One by one, separately, with regular intervals
s.f. 'Diverse-leaved'; a species of plant, Hemionitis cordifolia
s.f. 'Diverse-barked'; a species of aloe, Sanseviera zeylanica (com. called Mūrvā)
s.m. Making separate, separating, distinguishing, setting apart
part. Separated, severed, sundered, cut off; made distinct
adj. Of different kinds, various, diversified, multiform.

def: s.f. = S پرتهکتو पृथक्त्व pr̤ithaktva, s.m. Separateness, separation, diversity, severalty; singleness, individuality.
s.m. = S پرتهکتا पृथक्ता pr̤ithaktā, s.f. Separateness, separation, diversity, severalty; singleness, individuality.
s.f. = pr̤ithivī, q.v.
s.f. The wide world, the earth, Earth personified (as the mother of all beings); earth, land, ground, soil; a kind of metre in Sanskrit prosody
subs: s.m. A species of the atyasti metre
prithvī-pālak, s.m. 'Guardian of the earth,' king, sovereign, ruler
s.m. 'Lord of the earth,' prince, king, sovereign
s.m. Surface of the earth, ground, bare ground, the very earth
s.m. 'Reigning over the earth,' prince, king, sovereign
s.m. The earth considered as a world, the terrestrial world
s.m. The circuit or whole surface of the earth
s.m. 'Lord of the earth' = pr̤ithivī-pati, q.v.

def: adj. & s.m. Broad, wide, expansive, large, extensive, spacious; — name of the fifth monarch of the solar dynasty (in the second age); name of an ancient king, the son of Ven, rājā of Bettūr (who was married to a form of the goddess Lakshmī, and taught men to cultivate the earth, &c.); — s.f. A pungent seed, Nigella Indica; a medicinal substance (commonly called hingu-pattrī); opium
subs: (pr̤ithu+udara), adj. Big-bellied, stout, corpulent; — s.m. A ram

def: adj. See s.v. pr̤ithu.
s.f. = S پرتهتو पृथुत्व pr̤ithutva, s.m. Breadth, width, largeness, greatness.
s.m. = S پرتهتا पृथुता pr̤ithutā, s.f. Breadth, width, largeness, greatness.

s.f. Pleasure, joy, delight, gladness, happiness; enjoyment, gratification, satisfaction; graciousness, grace, favour, kindness; friendliness, friendship, liking, fondness (for), amity, regard, harmony, affection, love; — love personified as the wife of Kām-dev; name of the second nakshatra
subs: adv. Through favour or kind regard; in an affectionate manner, kindly, graciously, affectionately
prīti-dāya, s.m. 'Gift of love,' a present made from love or affection, a kind or friendly present, token of affection
prīti-kārī, prīti-kar, adj. Causing pleasure; inspiring love or affection, pleasing, agreeable: friendly, kind, affectionate
(-se, or -ke sang), To show affection (for), to make friends (with), to love
adj. Having love or affection (for), loving, fond, affectionate, kind, friendly, charitable
priti-yukt, vulg. prīti-yut, adj. = prīti-mān, q.v.

def: s.f. An army; division of an army consisting of two hundred and forty-three elephants, the same number of chariots, seven hundred and twenty-nine horses, and twelve hundred and fifteen foot
subs: s.m. The commander of an army.

def: adj. & s.m. (f. -ā) Beloved, dear (to), valued, prized, liked, desired; pleasing, amiable, agreeable, kind; — a beloved object, lover, husband; — a species of medicinal plant (com. called riddhi), a kind of drug
subs: s.m. Speaking kindly; kind or friendly speech
adj. & s.m. Speaking kindly, &c. = priya-vādī, q.v.
adj. & s.m. Dearest, most beloved; — a beloved, darling; a favourite friend; lover, sweetheart, husband
adj. & s.m. Pleasant or grateful to the sight; good-looking, handsome, beautiful, lovely; — a lovely-looking person; the look of a friend; a kind of date-tree, Terminalia tomentosa; Mimusops kauki
s.f. A dear female friend or companion, a confidante
s.m. A tree with fragrant flowers, Michelia champaca

priya-kārī, priya-kar, adj. & s.m. Doing a kindness (to), doing a favour, acting kindly (towards), treating kindly; causing pleasure or enjoyment, giving pleasure; kind, favourable, affectionate, beneficent; — a kind person, benefactor, friend, &c.
adj. & s.m. Beloved, dear; affectionate, loving; — a beloved person; an affectionate person
(priyam, neut. of priya), part. adj. & s.m. Become dear, beloved (by); one who has become an object of affection
s.f. = priyam-bhāvukatva, s.m. The having become dear or beloved; becoming beloved; amiability
adj. & s.m. Speaking kindly or agreeably, speaking affectionately; sweet-spoken, pleasant-spoken; flattering; — a pleasant-spoken person; a flatterer
s.m. A word of love, or of kindness
s.f. A creeping plant, Echites frutescens.

def: s.m. Love; service, kindness, favour; what is pleasing (to), will, pleasure
subs: (-kā), To do the will or pleasure (of).

def: See پري priya.
s.f. A beloved woman, favourite, darling, dear, sweetheart, mistress, wife; — priyā-vān, priyā-vat, adj. Having a mistress or sweetheart; being in love (with), enamoured (of).
adj. & s.m. See s.v. priya for compounds having that word for the first member.
s.m. A kind of variegated or spotted deer; a kind of bird; a bee; the plants Nauclea cadamba and Terminalia tomentosa.
adj. See s.v. priya.
s.m. The tree Buchanania latifolia.
s.m. Panic seed, Italian millet, Panicum italicum; — a medicinal plant and perfume (described as a fragrant seed, sometimes called phalī); — black mustard seed, Sinapis ramosa; — long pepper.
s.f. Dearness, the being dear or beloved; the being fond of, affection, love.
adj. & s.m. Most beloved, dearest; — a favourite, friend, beloved, lover, sweetheart, husband ( = pītam).
s.m. The act of sprinkling with water (esp. for purification), consecration by sprinkling; immolation of victims, killing (animals in sacrifice); a text to be repeated when an animal is sacrificed.
part. Sprinkled, purified by sprinkling; offered in sacrifice; immolated, slaughtered, killed.
part. Announced, declared, laid down (as a rule or axiom), said, told, uttered.
part. adj. Sojourning abroad or in a foreign country; away from home, absent, abroad
subs: s.f. A woman whose husband is abroad.

def: s.m.f. A bench, stool; a kind of carp, Cyprinus pausius
subs: s.m. The month Bhādra or Bhādoṅ (Aug.-Sept.)
s.f. 'The foot of a stool'; name of the twenty-sixth and twenty-seventh asterism (containing the stars in the wing of Pegasus)
s.f. The full moon in Bhādoṅ.

def: s.m. Great exertion or effort; great zeal, ardour; stimulus, incitement.
s.m. Instigator, inciter, exhorter, (in Law) the instigator of any crime
s.m. The act of inspiriting or inciting, instigation, stimulating to bold and vigorous effort.
part. Incited, instigated, stimulated, encouraged.
s.m. = pūʼā, q.v.
s.m. A cake made of flour and sugar and fried in ghī or oil.
adj. (Old H.) = pūrva, q.v.

adj. Empty, worthless, vain, absurd, of no moment or consequence, useless, unsubstantial, unsound, feeble, weak; petty, trivial, trifling, insignificant; unmeaning, nonsensical, inordinate, injudicious; vile, obscene, scurrilous; mean, low, base, shabby, scurvy; low-born; — s.m. A thing of no consequence, a mere nothing; absurdity, nonsense, obscenity, &c.
subs: adj. & s.m. Talking nonsense; using obscene language; — one who talks nonsense, &c. babbler, prater

def: s.m. A woollen rag for applying grease or ointment (to); plaister-brush, brush (for white-washing, &c.); sponge (of a gun); a thin coating of clay or white-wash
subs: (-par), pućārā denā (-ko), To wipe with a wet, or a greasy, cloth; to lay on a thin coat of clay or whitewash; to sponge (a gun); to give a gloss (to), to polish, clean, embellish, adorn; to soap, butter, soft sawder; to excite, instigate.

def: s.m.f. (?), Tail; hinder part (see pūṅćh).
s.f. lit. 'Per tail'; a tax on cattle.
s.f. Inquiry, question, interrogation; inquiry (after), call (for); investigation, examination
subs: pūćh-pićār, pūćh-pāćh, pūćh-paćh, pūćh-tāćh, pūćh-gaćh, s.f. Inquiry, interrogation, inquisition, inquisitiveness; investigation, examination

def: s.m. (Used in comp.) = pūćh
subs: s.m. = pūćhā-pāćhī, s.f. = pūćhā-tāćhī, s.f. = pūćhā-gaćhī, s.f. Inquiry, investigation, &c. = pūćh-pāćh, q.v.
(-kī), To investigate, &c.; to look into; to audit (accounts).

def: s.f. Inquiry into the future (of a wizard, &c.).
s.m. Asking, inquiring, &c. see next.
s.m. Asking; inquiry, investigation.
s.f. The tail of a nsh (see pūṅćh).
v.t. = pūćhnā, q.v.

ety: pūćh˚ = Prk. पुच्छ(इ) = S. पृच्छ(ति), rt. प्रछ
def: v.t. To ask (of, -se), to inquire (of), to question, interrogate; to refer (to), to consult; to ask or inquire after (in this and the following senses pūćhnā governs the dative form of the accusative instead of the ablative); to care (about), feel concern (for); to mind, heed, regard, take notice (of); to invite; to help, assist

ety: pućhwā, rt. of pućhwānā+iyā = S. इकः
def: s.m. Inquirer, seeker, interrogator.
v.t. To cause to ask, &c.
s.m. = pućārā, q.v.
s.f. The act of stroking, patting, &c.
v.t. To coax (a horse) by stroking, &c.; to stroke, pat, caress, coax, &c.; to urge (a horse) on, put (a horse) to speed.
s.m. Absurdity, foolish prattle, nonsense, stuff.
s.m. (?), Woof, the threads woven in the breadth of a piece of cloth across the warp (called, in Persian, tār).
s.m. = podīnā, q.v.

s.m. Assembly, union, association, corporation; — heap, quantity, multitude; disposition, property, nature ( = pot); — the Areca or betel-nut tree, Areca catechu, or A. faufel, and its fruit; — the Jak-tree, Artocarpus integrifolia
subs: s.m. The fruit of the Areca catechu, the Areca-nut; — pūg-roṭ, s.m. The marshy date tree, Phœnix or Elate paludosa.

def: v.n. (Old H.), To reach, &c. = pahuṅćnā.
v.t. Caus. of puganauṅ, q.v.
s.f. The Areca tree = pūg; — pūgī-phal, s.m. = pūg-phal, q.v.s.v. pūg.
v.n. To approach, draw near, come, arrive; — v.t. To cause to arrive, to send; to meet.
s.m. (Old H.) = pushp, q.v.
adj. = pūć, q.v.
adj. To be honoured, honourable, respectable, venerable; fit for or deserving adoration, adorable, worshipful
subs: adj. Idem; (also) being honoured or respected; being adored or worshipped.

def: s.f. Honour, worship, respect, reverence, veneration, homage (to superiors), adoration (of the gods); idol-worship, idolatry
subs: s.f. The finger with which ćandan is applied or sprinkled; — the finger on which the wedding ring is worn by European women
s.f. The attending for religious purposes on study and idol-worship
(-kī), To offer adoration, &c. (to), to worship, &c. = pūjnā, q.v.
ex: لوگ میری آگ جیسے جذبے کی پوجا کرتے ہیں
log merī āg jaise jazbe kī pūjā karte ha͠i

def: adj. & s.m. Honouring, respecting, venerating, adoring, worshipping; — a worshipper, an idolater, &c. ( = pujārī).
s.m. Reverencing, honouring; adoring, worshipping; respect, reverence; worship ( = pūjā); showing attention (to a visitor), treating with respect or hospitality
v.t. To fill; to complete; to accomplish.
v.t. = pujānā, q.v.
v.t. To cause to worship.
adj. = pūjya, pūj, q.v.
v.t. = pujānā.
s.m. The apparatus of worshipping; offerings, libations; things scattered about in disorder.
s.m. = pujāpā, q.v.
s.m. Worshipper; a priest who officiates at a shrine and lives upon the offerings made to the idol.
s.m. A worshipper ( = pujārī, q.v.).
adj. Reverencing, honouring, worshipping.
s.m. = pujāpā, q.v.
adj. & s.m. Honouring, worshipping; — a worshipper.
adj. & s.m. Honouring, worshipping; — a worshipper.
s.m. = pujārī, q.v.
s.m. = pujārī, q.v.
part. Honoured, respected, hospitably received; reverenced, worshipped, adored; acknowledged; recommended.
adj. See s.v. pūj.
v.t. = pūjnā, q.v.
v.n. To be filled; to be completed.

ety: Prk. पूजणअं; S. पूजनीयं, rt. पूज्
def: v.t. To honour, respect, venerate, to do homage (to), to reverence; to adore, worship; to idolatrize ( = pūjā karnā and pūjan karnā)
subs: v.t. To sacrifice, waste, spend (money, &c.) uselessly, to squander.
ex: چھوڑوں گا میں نہ اس بتِ کافر کا بغیر
choṛūṅgā ma͠i na us but-e-kāfir kā pūjnā
I will not leave off the worship of that idol of the kafirs
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀧𑀼𑀚𑁆𑀚𑀇 (pujjaï), from Sanskrit पूज्यते (pūjyate, “to be worshiped”, passive form). Related to پُوجا (pūjā, “worship, veneration”).

def: v.n. To be filled, be satisfied; to be completed, accomplished, fulfilled, perfected.
ex: چھوڑوں گا میں نہ اس بتِ کافر کا بغیر
choṛūṅgā ma͠i na us but-e-kāfir kā pūjnā
I will not leave off the worship of that idol of the kafirs
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀧𑀼𑀚𑁆𑀚𑀇 (pujjaï), from Sanskrit पूज्यते (pūjyate, “to be worshiped”, passive form). Related to پُوجا (pūjā, “worship, veneration”).

def: v.t. = pujwānā, q.v.
v.t. To cause to fill; to complete ( = pujānā).
v.t. = pujānā, q.v.
adj. Deserving of honour, venerable, &c. = pūj, q.v.
adj. = pūj-mān, q.v.s.v. pūj.
s.m. (f. -tā), The being entitled to honour or to worship, venerableness, honourableness.
s.f. Calling out aloud; call, shout, bawl, halloo, noise, din; cry, outcry, summons; invitation; invocation; petition, suit, complaint, plaint; call (for), want or lack (of), need (of).
s.m. Call, shout, &c. = pukār; noisiness, report, pretension, renown, fame, notoriety.
part. (of pukārnā), Called, published, proclaimed, &c.
subs: v.n. To be called, to be published, be proclaimed
s.m. The case of address, the vocative case.

def: s.f. Calling, crying out, &c. (see next).
adv. Aloud; openly, in public

ety: pukār˚ = S.स्फूत्कार or फूत्कार; Prk. पुक्कार˚
def: v.t. To call, call out to, to hail; to invoke; to invite; to summon; to publish, proclaim; to sue; to term, to denominate; — v.n. To call out, call alond; to cry (one's wares), to shout, bawl, to cry out, to exclaim; to lodge a complaint, to complain; to be called (as a roll-call)
subs: v.t. To call, &c.; to publish, proclaim.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀼𑀓𑁆𑀓𑀸𑀭𑁂𑀤𑀺 (pukkāredi), from Ashokan Prakrit *𑀧𑀼𑀓𑁆𑀓𑀸𑀭𑁆- (*pukkār-, “shout”), ultimately onomatopoeic.

def: s.m. = pūkh; pushya, q.v.
s.m. = pūsh; pushya, q.v.
s.m. A topaz; — the eighth nakshatra or lunar mansion.

ety: perf. part. of puḵẖtan; rt. Zend pać; S. pać
def: part. adj. Dressed, cooked; baked (as brick, &c.); ripe, matured, mature; shrewd, knowing, expert. skilful, wise; firm, strong, solid well-built, of brick or stone, of masonry (syn. pakkā — puḵẖta-kārī, s.f. Ripeness, maturity; firm, or sound, or solid workmanship
subs: v.t. To ripen; to make firm or strong; to make shrewd or knowing
adj. Of mature disposition, firm, experienced

def: s.f. The being cooked; ripeness, maturity; firmness, soundness, solidity, strength; experience (syn. pakkā-pan).

s.f. Cakes, or pieces of bread, which are laid over dishes when bringing to table, and under which the meat is kept warm; cakes imbued with ghī or clarified butter (from being laid over certain greasy dishes, as do-piyāza, &c.: These cakes are very soft, rich, and savoury; and hence māmā puḵẖtariyāṅ khānā, 'to eat rich meal cakes prepared by his mother,' is a phrase employed to denote one who is accustomed to luxury, and incapable of labour or fatigue).

ety: Old P. puhal; Pehl. puhar; Zend. peretu, fr. par = S. par
def: s.m. A bridge; a causeway, an embankment; — pul bāṅdhnā, v.n. To make a bridge (over, par), to bridge; to make an embankment or dike, to limit; to provide an abundant supply (of), to supply in abundance, to form a heap, to heap
subs: s.f. Embankment; keeping bridges or embankments in repair; a tax levied for this purpose; — sodomy
(-kī), To commit sodomy; to ravish, violate; — pul ṭūṭnā, v.n. 'Bridge to break'; to burst or come forth en masse, to crowd
s.m. A bridge over which (in the belief of Mohammadans) the righteous will pass into Paradise, and from which the wicked fall into hell, on the day of judgment.

def: s.m. The erection of the hairs of the body (considered as a proof of exquisite delight).
s.m. A small bundle of grass or straw
subs: v.n. lit. 'To live under a bundle of grass'; to live in a hut, to be miserably off.

def: s.m. contrac. of pūlā, q.v.
s.m. Name of an ancient Rishi, one of the mind-born sons of Brahmā ( = pulasti)
subs: (˚ha+āś), s.m. Name of a place of Hindū pilgrimage.

def: s.m. A ball or lump of boiled rice (see pulāʼo).

s.m. Erection of the hairs of the body (considered as occasioned by delight); thrill of joy; joy, delight, pleasure; — a species of edible plant; — a kind of stone or gem; — flaw or defect in a gem; — any kind of insect or vermin infesting animals; — a ball of bread and sweetmeats with which elephants are fed; — yellow orpiment; — a wine-glass, goblet.
s.m. A species of kadamb tree, Nauclea cadamba.
v.n. To experience a thrill of joy, to be delighted, to rejoice.
s.m. Bundle, parcel, package.
s.m. A dish made of rice boiled in soup with flesh, spices, &c.
s.m. Name of an ancient Rishi, one of the mind-born sons of Brahmā.
s.m. Name of an ancient Rishi, one of the mind-born sons of Brahmā.
v.t. To persuade (syn. phuslānā, q.v.).
s.f. dim. of pūlā, q.v.; a bundle of sheaves of corn given at harvest to village omcers and servants, or used as fodder for cattle.
s.m. (?), Land cultivated for every harvest (being never allowed to lie fallow).
s.m. A sandbank; land deposited by alluvium on the bank of a river; an island of alluvial formation or one from which the water has recently withdrawn, a small island; a sandy beach.
s.m. Name of a barbarous tribe; a man of this tribe; a barbarian, savage, a mountaineer; one who uses an uncultivated and unintelligible dialect.
s.f. A small bridge; a culvert.
v.t. To cause the hairs to stand erect; to give (one) a thrill of joy, to delight, rejoice.
adj. Having the hair standing erect with delight, thrilled with joy, delighted, rejoiced, overjoyed, enraptured.
s.m. The masculine gender (in Grammar): v. puṅ-ling, s.v. puṅ.
s.f. Softening food by turning it about in the mouth, turning food about in the mouth.
s.f. lit. 'Horripilation'; fear, dread, terror.

ety: S. पुल redupl. + H. caus. aff. ānā
def: v.n. 'To have the hairs erect through fear or terror,' to be stricken with fear, to shake or tremble with fear; to fear, dread.
v.t. To soften by chewing or by turning about in the mouth, to turn food about in the mouth in order to soften it (as a person without teeth does), to mumble.
s.f. Poultice.
s.m. Cotton
subs: adj. 'Having cotton in the ear'; deaf
adj. Silent in company, taciturn; — mealy-mouthed.

def: adj. Made of cotton; lined or quilted with cotton (a garment, &c.).
adj. & s.m. = puṇya, q.v.
s.f. The sound of a pipe or flute; the sound of breaking wind
subs: v.n. To give in, be defeated or vanquished; to be ruined, to fail.

def: s.m. Virtue, &c. (see puṇya).
s.m. Male, male being, man (used chiefly in comp.)
subs: adj. & s.m. Bringing forth a male; causing the birth of a male child; — the first of the essential ceremonies of Hindū initiation, a religious and domestic festival held on the mother's perceiving the first signs of a living conception
s.f. Manly vigour, manliness, manhood, virility
adj. & s.m., Chief, best, most excellent ( = śreshṭh); a distinguished or eminent person, a hero
vulg. pul-ling, s.m. The characteristic sign of a man, manhood, virility; the male organ; (in Gram.) the masculine gender
s.m. 'An elephant of a man,' a distinguished or preëminent man; — a white elephant; — the tree Rottleria tinctoria (from the blossoms of which a yellowish dye is prepared); — a white lotus; — nutmeg
s.m. A nakshatra or asterism regarded as a male; an asterism under which males are procreated.

def: adv. Again, once more, &c. = punar, q.v.
subs: puni-puni, adv. Again and again, over and over again, repeatedly; day by day.

def: adv. Again, afresh, &c. = punar, q.v.
subs: punah-punar, adv. Again and again, repeatedly; day by day; at one time — at another time

def: s.m. = puṇya, q.v.
v.t. To cause to abuse, to cause to reproach.
adv. Again, afresh, anew, once more; back, in an opposite direction or way; on the contrary; further, furthermore, besides; but, however, nevertheless; also; afterwards
subs: adv. = punar, q.v. punar-āvartit, part. Repeated
part. adj. & s.m. Said over again, repeated; — repetition, tautology
s.f. Re-existence; — a virgin widow remarried
s.m. (f. ā), New or second birth; the birth of new principles within, leading to a change of life and character, regeneration; future birth by transmigration, metempsychosis
s.f. lit. 'Becoming new or young again'; hog-weed, Bœrhavia procumbens
s.m. Name of the seventh nakshatra; — an epithet of Vishṇu; and of Śiva.

def: s.f. Day of full moon ( = pūrṇa-mā), q.v.s.v. pūrṇa.
s.f. Day of full moon ( = pūrṇa-mā), q.v.s.v. pūrṇa.
s.f. = pūćh, q.v.
s.f. A tail; (fig.) a follower, hanger-on, a parasite.
adj. & s.m. Having a tail, tailed; — an animal with a long tail.
s.m. A tail ( = pūṅćh).
s.m. A lotus-flower; a white lotus; — a kind of sacrifice; — a kind of rice; — a kind of leprosy; — a species of snake, Amphisbœna; — a leopard
subs: (˚ka+aksha), adj. & s.m. Lotus-eyed, an epithet of Vishnu.

def: s.m. = punḍarīyak, q.v.
s.m. The flower of the Hibiscus mutabilis, or the Ketmia mutabilis; — a kind of drug.
s.m. A kind of drug, &c. = punḍarīyak, q.v.
s.m. = pūg, q.v.
s.f. A kind of nostril ornament.
adj. See s.v. puṅ.
s.f. = pūṅgī; and pūg, qq.v.
subs: s.m. Betel-nut, the fruit of the Areca catechu ( = pūṅgī-phal).

def: s.f. A reed, pipe, flute; a kind of pipe played upon by jugglers or certain jogīs, and snake-charmers (a drone made of leather or of a dried pumpkin with a single or double bamboo tube attached to it, having eight holes, and played on as a flageolet).
s.m. = pūg-phal, q.v.s.v. pūg (also written pūgī-phal).
s.m. (local), A boy.
s.f. = pūnī, q.v.
s.f. Rolls of cotton prepared for spinning, skeins of cotton.
adv. = punah, punar, q.v.
s.m. The full moon ( = pūrṇi-mā, q.v.).
s.m. = pūrṇimā, q.v.
part. adj. Pure, clean.
s.m. Heap, mass, quantity, multitude, collection, aggregate, the whole.
s.f. Heap, store, &c. = pūnjī, q.v.
s.f. Heap, mass, store, stock; stock-in-trade, fund, capital, principal; wealth, property
subs: s.f. Joint stock, capital of a company.

def: s.m. See s.v. puṅ.
v.t. See پننا punnā.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀡𑁆𑀡 (paṇṇa), from Sanskrit पर्ण (parṇa).

def: v.t. To reproach, revile, abuse; to disgrace.
s.m. See s.v. puṅ.
s.m. Male, man, human being; servant, attendant; the soul, spirit (see puṅ)
subs: s.f. lit. 'Running after men'; a wanton or unchaste woman, harlot
s.m. The characteristic of a male, membrum virile.

def: s.f. A thin roller on which cotton is prepared for spinning (see pūnī).
s.m. See s.v. puṅ.
s.f. See s.v. puṅs.
s.m. The being a male; the state of a male; manhood, virility; semen virile.
v.t. To cause to be reproached or reviled, cause to be abused, cause to be disgraced.
see پنيه puṇya.
s.m. = puṇyāh, q.v.

adj. & s.m. Good, pure, holy, righteous, virtuous, right, just; happy, prosperous, favourable, propitious, auspicious, lucky; bright, fine, beautiful, pleasing; sweet, fragrant; — good, right, virtue, moral or religious merit; virtuous action, a good or meritorious act; happiness; welfare; good fortune
subs: (˚ya+āt˚), adj. Pure-souled, righteous, virtuous, holy, pious, religious; charitable; continent
(˚ya+ar˚), v.t. To leave as a legacy

(˚ya+aha), s.m. A good, happy, or auspicious day, a holy-day, a day on which religious observances are enjoined; the day on which tenants make the first payment of annual rents to their landlord, and on which the amount of revenue to be collected in the ensuing year is fixed
puṇya-bhū, s.f. The holy land of the Hindūs (bounded on the north by the Himalayas, on the south by the Vindhya mountains, and on the east and west by the sea); — the mother of a male child
s.m. The might and efficacy of virtue or of the merit acquired by a course of virtuous acts
s.m. The fruit or reward of good works or meritorious actions
s.m. Holy grass, the white variety of kuśa grass
s.m. A holy shrine, a place of pilgrimage
adj. & s.m. Of beautiful appearance; — the blue jay
adj. Regarding or taking note of religious merit
s.m. Sacred place, holy or consecrated ground
adj. Of a virtuous disposition, disposed to virtuous acts, virtuous, pious, righteous
puṇya-karm, s.m. A virtuous or meritorious act
adj. & s.m. Doing good works, upright, righteous, virtuous, pious; — a person whose actions are holy or meritorious, &c.
s.m. Village of virtue or merit; happy or fortunate village
adj. Of or belonging to a holy village
adj. & s.m. Sweet-scented, fragrant; — the ćampā-flower, Michelia champaka
s.m. The abode of the holy and blessed, heaven, paradise
puṇya-vant, adj. Possessing merit, meritorious, &c. ( = puṇya)
(˚ya+ud), s.m. Good fortune considered as the result of virtuous acts done in a former life.

def: s.f. = pūnauṅ and pūrṇa-mā, q.v.
s.m. See s.v. puṇya.

s.f. A virtuous action performed (according to those who hold the doctrine of the metempsychosis) in one state of existence, the reward of which is received in a future transmigration; — merit of an ancestor rewarded in his descendants.
s.f. = pūnauṅ and pūrṇa-mā, q.v.
s.m. A cake ( = pūʼā, q.v.); bread
subs: (˚pa+ash˚), s.f. The eighth day of the second half of the month Mārgśīr (Nov. Dec.) on which cakes of rice are offered to the manes

def: s.m. (f. -ī), A kind of sweet cake of wheaten flour fried with ghī or oil ( = pūʼā, q.v.).
s.f. A sort of cake or biscuit made of meal or barley half baked or fried.
s.m. (f. -ikā), A cake.
s.m. (Old H.) = pushp, q.v.
v.t. contrac. of pulpulānā, q.v.

ety: Pehl. pūr; Zend pouru; S. puru
def: adj. Full, full of, laden, charged, complete, abounding in, exceeding, quite, very (used at the beginning of compounds)
subs: adj. Full of ceremony, ceremonious; elaborated, wrought
adj. Full of caution, very careful
adj. Full of danger, very hazardous or risky
adj. Full of blood; bleeding, sorrowful (heart)
adj. Full of pain, painful; sorrowful (heart)
adj. Full of courage, courageous, intrepid, magnanimous; intelligent; liberal, large-hearted
adj. Full of years, old, aged
adj. Full of melancholy, very melancholy, sorrowful; full of madness, quite mad
adj. Very evident or manifest, quite obvious
adj. Full of advantage or profit, very advantageous or profitable; full of instruction, highly edifying
adj. Full of sedition and mischief, seditious, very mischievous; very depraved
adj. Skilful, efficient, full of workmanship, well-executed, close, thick
adj. Very malicious or spiteful, rancorous
adj. Full of talk, talkative, loquacious
s.f. Talkativeness, loquacity, volubility of tongue
adj. Abounding in good things, plentiful, fertile
adj. Embellished or decorated throughout, highly ornamented, beautifully decorated
adj. Full of light, enlightened, illustrious
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀭𑀺 (pari), 𑀉𑀧𑁆𑀧𑀭𑀺 (uppari), from Sanskrit उपरि (upari, “above”).

def: s.m. A son.
s.m. City, town, &c. = pura, pur, q.v.
adj. Full, &c. = pūrā, q.v. (used in comp., e.g. bhar-pūr)
subs: v.n. To be able to perform an engagement, to discharge an obligation; to be successful

def: s.m. Filling, satisfying; a large quantity of water; flood; lake; — a cake fried in oil or butter ( = puṛī); — drawing in breath slowly through the nose (as a religious exercise); — the cleansing or healing of ulcers or wounds; — a reply; — an ear-ornament.
s.m. A large village, town, cluster of houses; ward, quarter (of a town); (in comp.) apartment; — skin; the skin of a drum
subs: v.n. 'To sound both skins of a drum'; to act a part, play the hypocrite.

def: s.m. A large parcel or packet (as of physic, &c.; cf. puṛiyā).
s.m. (Prov.) The buttock ( = puṭṭhā, q.v.)
subs: v.n. To be about to calve (a cow).

def: adj. (f. ī), Full, complete, perfect; satisfied; fulfilled, accomplished; entire, whole, total, undivided, undiminished, unbroken, uncut; exact, precise, fitting, coinciding, just, sufficient, enough; true, standard, up to the mark; faithful, constant, firm; old, ripe, experienced, skilled in; powerful
subs: v.n. To turn out up to the mark, to come out (of an ordeal) with credit, to pass a satisfactory examination, to succeed
s.m. Stamp paper of full value
s.f. (in Gram.) A complete sentence, a proposition
(or pūrī) parṇā, v.n. To be enough, to suffice
adj. Gone the full time, gone nine months with child; — pūre din lagnā, v.n. To approach the full period of gestation (a woman), to enter on the ninth month of pregnancy
v.t. To fill, fill up; to satisfy; to end, complete, finish; to accomplish, to fulfil, carry out, act up to, keep (a promise); to reimburse; to make up (a deficiency).
ex: پورے آسمان میں راکھ پھیل گئی تھی
pūre āsamān mẽ rākh phail gayī thī
Ash had spread across the whole sky.
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀧𑀽𑀭𑀬 (pūraya, “filling”), from Sanskrit पूरक (pūraka, “filling”).

def: s.m. A kind of sweet cake made of meal ( = pūʼā; pūrī).
s.m. Fortified town, castle, city, town; village, hamlet (most com. at the end of comp.); a leathern bag for drawing water for irrigation ( = pur-vaṭ)
subs: s.m. Magistrate or protector of a town or city
s.m. Gate of a town or city
s.f. The tutelary deity of a town or village
adv. In the direction of the city, &c.
adj. Situated in a city or town
s.m. A city-matter; an affair of domestic policy
pur-vāsī, adj. & s.m. Inhabiting a city or town; — inhabitant of a city, &c., citizen, townsman.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀭𑀺 (pari), 𑀉𑀧𑁆𑀧𑀭𑀺 (uppari), from Sanskrit उपरि (upari, “above”).

def: s.m. = pūrab, q.v.
s.f. = pūrabnī, q.v.
s.f. The wife of a pūrbiyā, q.v.
s.m. See s.v. puras.
s.f. = pūrā-pan, q.v.

adj. & s.m. Filling, completing; filling up; satisfying; full, &c. ( = pūrā, q.v.); — that which fills or completes; — (in Arith.) the multiplier; — a cake of meal offered at the conclusion of the funeral rites or oblation to the manes; — closing the right nostril and drawing up air through the left (as a religious exercise); — a citron, Citrus medica.
s.m. Filling, filling up; completing; satisfying; — a dam, dike, causeway; — the ocean; — multiplication (in Arith.); — a species of fragrant grass, Cyperus rotundus
subs: v.t. To fill, fill up, &c. = pūrā karnā, q.v.s.v. pūrā.

ety: purā˚ = purāw˚ = Prk. पुरावे(इ), or पुराव(इ) = S. पूर (caus. of पॄ)+आपय(ति)
def: v.t. To fill; to fulfil; to complete, finish.
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀧𑀼𑀭𑀸𑀡 (purāṇa) + Middle Indo-Aryan -𑀓- (-ka-), from Sanskrit पुराण (purāṇa).

def: adj. (f. -ī), Old, ancient; worn out, old-fashioned, antiquated, obsolete, out of date; experienced, sage, knowing.
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀧𑀼𑀭𑀸𑀡 (purāṇa) + Middle Indo-Aryan -𑀓- (-ka-), from Sanskrit पुराण (purāṇa).

def: adj. & s.m. Belonging to ancient or olden times, ancient, old, aged, primeval; worn out, laid aside; — a thing of the past, past event; a tale of the past, ancient history legendary and traditionary, legend; the name given to certain well-known sacred works (supposed to have been compiled by the poet Vyāsa, and comprising the whole body of modern Hindū theology and mythology. There are eighteen acknowledged purāṇas).
s.m. 'Fortress - destroyer,' an epithet of Indra; a thief, house-breaker; — a species of pepper, Piper chaba.
s.m. Oldness, ancientness, antiquity.
s.f. The cross threads in weaving a piece of cloth; the silk-cotton tree, Bombax heptaphyllum.
adj. & s.m. Old, ancient; — an old man, an elder; a patron.
s.m. The living principle, life, the soul (personified as a king).
s.f. Understanding, intelligence, intellect (personified as the wife of a king).
s.m. The armpit.
s.m. 'City-conqueror,' name of several ancient Hindū personages.

ety: pūrā, q.v.+pan = Prk. प्पण = त्वण = S. त्वं
def: s.m. Fulness, completeness, entireness; completion, end, finish; perfection, accomplishment, fulfilment; sufficiency, competency; ripeness, maturity, full development.

ety: changeable to purah, puraś, puro, in comp.
def: adv. Before, in front, in advance, in the presence of
subs: adj. & s.m. Going in advance, preceding, leading; — one who goes before, leader, forerunner, precursor, harbinger, attendant
s.m. A preparatory or introductory rite, preparation; repetition of the name of a deity accompanied with burnt offerings
s.m. A species of grass, Imperata cylindrica (syn. ulū)
s.m. The placing before or in front; preference; showing respect, treating with honour, distinction, deference; promotion, advancement; worshipping; consecrating; an honorary gift
adj. Placing a thing in front; advancing, promoting, &c.

part. adj. Born before; — puro-dāś, puro-das, s.m. A sacrificial cake of ground rice (usually divided into pieces and offered in one or more cups); an oblation of ghī or clarified butter with cakes of ground meal; a sort of flat ladle or spoon used for placing the cakes in the sacrificial fire.

def: s.m. See s.v. puras.
s.m. See s.v. puras.
s.m. Gold.
adj. Belonging to the past, former, old, ancient; experienced, knowing, sage; — s.m. Ancient story, old legend.
